caveats.summary: The flight-deck repo was archived on GitHub 2026-06-29 and moved out of the active fleet tree (read-only remote). Marked deprecated here rather than removed: an install from before the archival may still be present/running on this box, so the entry stays honest about detect/status without offering fresh install or management.

Self-contained bundle verified booting from the Tender-managed location (po-mac, flight-deck PR 155): book-server + embedded Node sidecar serve /health from ~/Library/Application Support/Tender. Remaining: unsigned dev/eval build — first launch needs right-click → Open to clear Gatekeeper quarantine. Signing/notarization is the separate `released`-rung gate.

Audiobook (ffmpeg + python3) and prose-telemetry (python3) are optional features that spawn local tools at request time; they degrade gracefully (clear error) when absent. The core HTTP API is fully self-contained.
